resources.string:
Thank you for playing College Football Coach: Career Edition! 

Please share any feedback to the developer on how to improve this game! 

 v1.4 
+ New Dashboard UI 
+ Added Offensive and Defensive Coordinators 
+ New Player and Coaching Profiles 
+ Year-by-Year Stats 
+ Updated Transfers Dialogs 
+ In-Game Injuries 
+ Several game tweaks and code re-writes 
+ Ability to Cut Players 
+ Convert to Pro-Rel in Preseason 

 v1.4.33 
+ Added Coaching Age Import Feature
